metadata.title: AI Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate images with AI models using text-to-image and image-to-image workflows, with prompt control, reference image support, and high-quality visual output.

page.title: AI Image Generator
page.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

generator.title: Image Generator
generator.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the image you want to generate......
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, support multiple images
form.reference_image_hint: Click to upload or drag images
form.reference_image_format: PNG · JPG · WebP — up to {maxImages}, {maxSizeMB}MB each
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

featured.title: Featured Inspiration
featured.description: Click any template below to auto-fill the prompt

generator.tip_message: Tip: more specific descriptions get closer to what you want
generator.progress_pending: Waiting for the model to start

showcase_dialog.title: Allow for Showcase Display?
showcase_dialog.description: Your work can help others learn how to use AI for image generation.

errors.timed_out: Image generation timed out. Please try again.
errors.provider_returned_no_images: The provider returned no images. Please retry.
errors.no_provider_or_model: Provider or model is not configured correctly
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
errors.no_providers_configured: No AI providers configured, please contact administrator
errors.prompt_blocked: Prompt did not pass safety review. Please revise it and try again.
errors.moderation_unavailable: Content safety review is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

moderation_dialog.title: Prompt did not pass safety review
moderation_dialog.description: Please revise your prompt and try again.
moderation_dialog.service_unavailable: Content safety review is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
